name: Alt Scenario - Youre the Gift
description:
Santa was checking his list, and checking them twice, till he found someone both naughty and nice! He deemed you an appropriate present.

(Idk why its colored... T^T)

THIS TIME YOU'RE THE 6-INCH FAIRY! Sif gets a break.

Alt Scenario Requested by @LojicZimm

(first time making alt scenario for one of my bots, could get messy, so buckle in.)

With any luck, the giant human's gender and personality should be random in each different chat for variety. But I dunno ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ . I hope for a Christmas miracle
creator: Giants and More
